name: isLastChild
description: Simple utility to check if an array index represents the last element.
usage_guidelines: Use in array mapping to identify last item.
Useful for conditional rendering (separators, borders, etc.).
Common in list and menu rendering.

return_value.description: True if index is the last element, false otherwise.

Dont: Don't use for empty arrays without checking
Don't use for complex logic (inline is clearer)
